entities.name: System
entities.description: Core software system owned by the organization

entities.name: External Security Service
entities.description: Third-party service providing security capabilities under any circumstances

entities.name: External Payment Gateway
entities.description: Third-party payment processing service

entities.name: System User
entities.description: Human actor interacting with the system

entities.name: Web Application
entities.description: Deployable web application container handling user interactions and core business logic

entities.name: API Gateway
entities.description: Deployable API gateway container managing secure access and routing

entities.name: Database
entities.description: Persistent data storage for the system

entities.name: Authentication Module
entities.description: Handles user authentication and authorization

entities.name: Payment Processing Module
entities.description: Handles payment transactions efficiently

entities.name: Data Access Layer
entities.description: Manages database read/write operations with reliability (Supports R11: Backup and recovery procedures must be robust to prevent data loss and ensure system reliability in case of failures.)

entities.name: System Under Design
entities.description: Core system addressing security, cost efficiency, performance, reliability, and compatibility requirements

entities.name: Data Store
entities.description: Deployable data storage container optimized for cost and performance efficiency

entities.name: Public User
entities.description: A member of the public who accesses the system during high-demand periods such as public events or emergencies

entities.name: High-Demand System
entities.description: Software system that handles high-demand periods during public events or emergencies, ensuring performance efficiency and reliability

entities.name: High-Demand Service Container
entities.description: Deployable unit responsible for handling traffic surges during public events or emergencies, ensuring performance efficiency and reliability

entities.name: Police Officer
entities.description: A human actor who uses the system, potentially over public or unsecured networks

entities.name: System
entities.description: The software system used by police officers to perform their duties (Supports R12: Officers can directly attach photos and videos to their incident reports through the system interface.)

entities.name: Secure Gateway
entities.description: A container that provides secure access control and encryption for communications over public or unsecured networks

entities.name: Authentication Service
entities.description: A component within the Secure Gateway that handles authentication of officers and public users accessing the system

entities.name: Encryption Module
entities.description: A component that encrypts data in transit over public or unsecured networks

entities.name: Secure Communication Module
entities.description: Handles secure data transmission when officers use public or unsecured networks

entities.name: Incident Management System
entities.description: Software system that handles fluctuating numbers of active officers and incidents, ensuring performance and cost efficiency (Supports R18: The system must process and analyze incident data efficiently to provide timely and relevant information to officers in the field.) (Supports R20: Officers should be able to customize their dashboard to access the most relevant information quickly.) (Supports R27: The system must provide officers with clear, actionable notifications and alerts during critical situations.) (Supports R28: The system shall provide officers access to historical data and analytics on past incidents and outcomes for informed decision-making.)

entities.name: Police Officer
entities.description: Active officer whose fluctuating numbers must be accommodated by the system

entities.name: Billing System
entities.description: A software system responsible for handling billing operations, particularly in areas with higher charges

entities.name: Customer
entities.description: Human actor who incurs charges and interacts with billing

entities.name: Charge Engine
entities.description: Deployable container that computes charges with awareness of higher-charge areas

relationships.description: Interacts with web application
Sends API requests through gateway
Authenticates via external security service
Processes payments via external gateway
Reads/writes data to database
Delegates authentication to module
Delegates payment processing to module
Uses data access layer for operations
Interacts with web application
Sends API requests through gateway
Reads/writes data
Delegates security operations to external service
Reads/writes data directly
Public user accesses the Event Response System during high-demand periods
Load balancer routes traffic to redundant containers for reliability
Accesses the public information system during high-demand periods
Contains the high-demand service container that handles traffic surges
Public user accesses the system during high-demand periods such as public events or emergencies
Uses the police system over public or unsecured networks
May interact with the police system from public networks
Contains secure gateway for network security
Delegates authentication to the authentication service
Uses encryption module to secure data in transit
Uses the system, potentially over public or unsecured networks
Interacts with the system
Police officer uses the system
System contains secure communication module for handling public/unsecured network usage
Police officer uses secure communication module when on public or unsecured networks
Police Officer uses the Incident Management System to manage incidents
Police officers use the Incident Management System to manage fluctuating active officers and incidents
Customer sends billing requests to the Billing API
Billing API invokes Charge Engine to compute charges
